SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
BoardBounds
Strategy for what happens when the snake reaches a board edge.
Direction
The four cardinal movement directions for the snake.
Food
Immutable representation of a single food item on the board.
FoodType
Classifies food items by their effect on the snake and score.
GameBoard
 
GameConfig
Immutable configuration snapshot for one game session.
GameController
MVC Controller — wires the model and the view together.
GameModel
Central model for the Snake game.
GameState
Lifecycle states of a game session.
Launcher
Launcher — точка входа, отделённая от SnakeApplication.
Point
Immutable value object representing a single cell position on the game grid.
Snake
Manages the snake body as an ordered sequence of grid cells.
SnakeApplication
JavaFX application entry point.
SolidWallBounds
Classic boundary rule: moving outside the board is fatal.
WrapAroundBounds
Toroidal boundary rule: the snake exits one edge and re-enters from the opposite side.
